title: oenothera hirsuta
intro: Oenothera hirsuta, also known as hairy evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's seeds and leaves have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, due to their ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Oenothera hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
